# infinity_recurring_conference

Manages a recurring conference configuration. Recurring conferences are used for scheduled conference series.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_recurring_conference" "example" {
  conference      = "/configuration/v1/conference/1/"
  current_index   = 0
  ews_item_id     = "AAMkAGVm...ExampleRecurringEwsItemId"
  is_depleted     = false
  subject         = "Weekly Team Standup"
  scheduled_alias = "/configuration/v1/scheduled_alias/1/"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `conference` (String) The conference identifier or URI associated with this recurring conference.
- `current_index` (Number) The current occurrence index for this series.
- `ews_item_id` (String) The ID of the Exchange Web Services Item this recurring conference is associated with.
- `is_depleted` (Boolean) Whether or not all occurrences in this series have been depleted.

### Optional

- `scheduled_alias` (String) The scheduled alias for the recurring conference.
- `subject` (String) The subject that was used in the meeting email. Maximum length: 255 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the recurring conference.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the recurring conference


## Import

Recurring conferences can be imported using their resource ID:

```bash
terraform import pexip_infinity_recurring_conference.example 123
```
